{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/03-section-3-solution-architecture.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "Section 3: Proposed solution architecture (existing components + integration)"
tags:
  * memory
  * ingestion
  * architecture
  * anthropic
  * collaboration
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. Section 3: Proposed solution architecture (existing components + integration)


{quote}> Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Вакансии в Anthropic по кластерам - Claude}} (корень репозитория). Раздел диалога — Variant C: написание concept document для Anthropic Beneficial Deployments outreach (8–15 с{quote}
_Проекты:_ NGT Memory, Wikontic

----





{quote}Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Вакансии в Anthropic по кластерам - Claude}} (корень репозитория). Раздел диалога — Variant C: написание concept document для Anthropic Beneficial Deployments outreach (8–15 страниц).{quote}

Section 3: Proposed solution architecture

Building on existing components from Russian-speaking Habr community и elsewhere:

HyperCortex Mesh Protocol (kagvi13) для federation

Свяжи-style hybrid extraction для structured profiles

Wikontic-style ontology для legal domain alignment

Hebbian matching (NGT Memory pattern) для cross-practitioner discovery

MCP wrappers для agent platform interoperability

CAMEL или Hermes для local agent execution

Cowork или local AI hubs для practitioner UX

This is architecturally feasible synthesis, не build-from-scratch. Existing components + integration layer + domain specialization.



----

_Смотрите также:_
* [[09-section-9-timeliness]]
* [[06-section-6-proposer-role]]
* [[08-section-8-risks-mitigations]]
* [[07-section-7-success-metrics]]




----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[09-section-9-timeliness]] (сходство 0.35)
* [[06-section-6-proposer-role]] (сходство 0.34)
* [[08-section-8-risks-mitigations]] (сходство 0.31)
